titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 397
GA 397
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: ο εδωκε changed to δεδωκε at 5.26 by David Parker.
υπηρε[εται] changed to υπηρε[ται] at 18.36 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 1.3 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Word break in 12.48 changed by Rachel Kevern.
Tagging of T/Z readings in 1.23 corrected by David Parker.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Ghost pages removed by Catherine Smith.
οιω in K5V4 changed to one word from 2 (οι ω) by Catherine Smith (at request of David Parker)
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α number: 397Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: Βase text: ΤRnsΤranscribed by: UΒSΤranscription begun: 14.10.10Τranscription finished:Ιs this a transcription made from a collation: Ιf so, who did the collation:Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Νo Ιnitials and other enlarged letters - Yes Νo Diples - Νo Yes: Οn the following folios 00r, 00v ... Οbeloi (æ) - Νo Yes: Οn the following folios 00r, 00v ... Οther remarks: Verses 19.16-22.0 have not been included in this transcription but are being treated as a supplement 04_303971, which contains 19.23-22.0. The hand is clearly the same, but the supplementary leaves are not commentary which is why they have been treated as supplementary. Update 07.03.2013 RK - it was decided not to treat the supplement as a supplement and to join the two transcriptions together, so 04_303971 no longer exists. FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: view layout and script for the lemma
